title: BCI Metrics Envelope v1
description: Normalized BCI-derived entertainment metrics window for HorrorPlace VM-Constellation. All metric bands are normalized to [0,1]; DET is normalized to [0,10]. signalQuality enum matches bci-summary-v1.

windowId.description: Identifier for this metrics analysis window; should align with the corresponding feature envelope windowId when paired.

sessionId.description: Pseudonymous identifier for the recording session; must not be a dataset subject ID or any direct player identifier.

timestamp.description: Window start time in Unix epoch milliseconds.

featureEnvelopeId.description: Optional reference to the originating feature envelope or NDJSON file identifier.

processingVersion.description: Version string for the processing pipeline that produced this metrics envelope.

calibrationProfileId.description: Optional identifier for the calibration profile active in the feature-processing stage.
Identifier for the calibration profile used for metrics normalization at this stage. Preferred location for calibration profile reference.

emdBand.description: Environmental Mystery Density band, normalized to [0,1].

stciBand.description: Safe-Threat Contrast Index band, normalized to [0,1].

cdlBand.description: Cognitive Dissonance Load band, normalized to [0,1].

arrBand.description: Ambiguous Resolution Ratio band, normalized to [0,1].

detEstimate.description: Dread Exposure Time estimate for this window, on canonical [0,10] scale aligned with invariants.

overload.description: True when the metrics suggest the player is in an overload regime for this window.

underengaged.description: True when the metrics suggest the player is under-engaged for this window.

signalQuality.description: Qualitative indicator of BCI signal quality for this window. Enum is kept in sync with bci-summary-v1.

method.description: Method used to derive metrics from features.

smoothingAlpha.description: Alpha parameter when EMA or similar smoothing is used. Optional for non-smoothing methods.

modelId.description: Optional identifier for the model used to compute metrics, especially for ML methods.

featureMappingVersion.description: Optional version string for the feature-to-metrics mapping specification.

featureMappingRules.description: Optional list of human-readable mapping rules or tags applied in this transform.
